Chisimu Uwwe tujitulwisye jalakwe (Qur'aniji) m’Chilo Chakuchimbichika.
Ana ni chichi champaka chimmanyisye ya Chilo Chakuchimbichika?
Chilo Chakuchimbichikachi chiŵele chambone nnope kupunda myesi jakwana sausande (1000).Footnote-1
Achimalaika akasatulukaga pamo ni Nsimu (Jibulilu) mu Chele (Chilochi) kwa lisosa lya M’mbuje gwao, kwisa kulondesya chindu chilichose (pakuchiŵika mu mpango wakwe).Footnote-2
